mapper.select:
SELECT id, course_id AS courseId, chapter_name AS chapterName, chapter_description AS chapterDescription, sort_order AS sortOrder, duration, created_time AS createdTime, updated_time AS updatedTime FROM course_chapter
AND course_id = #{q.courseId}
AND chapter_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.chapterName}, '%')
ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, course_id AS courseId, chapter_name AS chapterName, chapter_description AS chapterDescription, sort_order AS sortOrder, duration, created_time AS createdTime, updated_time AS updatedTime FROM course_chapter WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course_chapter ( course_id, chapter_name, chapter_description, sort_order, duration ) VALUES ( #{dto.courseId}, #{dto.chapterName}, #{dto.chapterDescription}, #{dto.sortOrder}, #{dto.duration} )
mapper.update: UPDATE course_chapter SET course_id = #{dto.courseId}, chapter_name = #{dto.chapterName}, chapter_description = #{dto.chapterDescription}, sort_order = #{dto.sortOrder}, duration = #{dto.duration} WHERE id = #{dto.id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, course_id AS courseId, chapter_name AS chapterName, chapter_description AS chapterDescription, sort_order AS sortOrder, duration, created_time AS createdTime, updated_time AS updatedTime FROM course_chapter WHERE course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
